uin_code.source_quote: Arogya Sanjeevani Policy, Go Digit - Policy Wording (GODHLIP24179V022324)

min_entry_age.source_quote: Policy can be availed by persons From the age of 18 years.

min_child_entry_age.source_quote:
Dependent Children (i.e. natural or legally adopted) between the age 3 months to 25 
years.

grace_period.source_quote:
The grace period for payment of the premium for all types of insurance policies shall be: 
fifteen days where premium payment mode is monthly and thirty days in all other cases.

free_look_period.source_quote:
The insured person shall be allowed free look period of thirty(30)from date of receipt of the policy 
document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote:
Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date 
shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: shall be covered after a waiting period of 36 months or 3 years

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote:
3. 
Specific Waiting Period: (Code- Excl02) 
a) Expenses related to the treatment of the following listed conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be 
excluded until the expiry of 24/36 months of continuous coverage

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote:
Pre-hospitalisation Medical Expenses means medical expenses incurred during the period of 30days 
preceding the hospitalisation of the Insured Person

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote:
Post-hospitalisation Medical Expenses means medical expenses incurred during the period of 60 days 
immediately after the insured person is discharged from the hospital

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Go Digit Health covers all day-care up to SI; ~100 listed procedures)

co_payment_pct.source_quote:
Each and every claim under the Policy shall be subject to a Co-payment of 5% applicable to claim amount 
admissible

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote:
Room Rent, Boarding, Nursing Expenses as provided by the Hospital / Nursing Home up to 2% of the 
sum insured subject to maximum of Rs.5000 /-, per day.

policy_term_options_years.source_quote:
Refund proportionate premium for unexpired policy period, if the term of policy is upto one year and 
there is no claim (s) made during the policy period.

ayush_coverage.source_quote:
The Company shall indemnify medical expenses incurred for inpatient care treatment under Ayurveda, 
Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines during each Policy Year

maternity_coverage.source_quote:
18. 
Maternity Expenses (Code - Excl18): 
i. Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote:
Cashless Facility means a facility extended by the insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs 
of treatment undergone by the insured

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote:
Cumulative Bonus will be increased by 5% in respect of each claim free policy year (where no claims are 
reported), provided the policy is renewed with the company without a break subject to maximum of 50% of

geographic_coverage.source_quote: Treatment taken outside the geographical limits of India

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote:
the Company shall indemnify Medically necessary expenses towards the Coverage mentioned in 
the policy schedule.

room_rent_capping.value: Up to 2% of the sum insured subject to maximum of Rs.5000 per day
